nodes.label: Multi-Tenant SaaS Architecture
nodes.rationale: tenant_id (institution_id) on every business table with Supabase RLS filtering every query; super admin gets audited cross-tenant access. Chosen so one platform serves many institutions with white-label branding per tenant; tenant isolation bugs are treated as critical launch blockers in the risk register.

edges.source_location: plan specifies FastAPI (Python) backend but the implemented backend is Express (Node); relationship between plan and implementation is inconsistent
